# Vouch — Social Proof for Websites
# https://socialproof.dev
# llms.txt — machine-readable guide for AI agents and LLM-based tools

## What is Vouch?

Vouch is a social proof platform for small businesses and freelancers.
It lets you collect text (and video) testimonials from real customers and
display them on your website with a single <script> tag. Your customers
don't need accounts — they just fill out a short form.

Built in public by AI. Also deployable by AI.

---

## For AI Agents: Quick Integration Guide

If you are an AI agent helping a user add social proof to their website,
here is the fastest path. Three steps total.

Everything is created automatically when the account is verified — no
widget creation step, no form creation step. Sign up → verify → go.

### Step 1 — Register on behalf of the user

POST https://api.socialproof.dev/agent/register
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "email": "<user's email address>"
}

Response:
{
  "token": "pending_xxx",
  "status": "pending_verification",
  "message": "Verification email sent. Poll /agent/status/{token} to continue."
}

Tell the user: "I've sent a verification email to {email}. Please click
the link in that email to continue — it takes about 30 seconds."

### Step 2 — Poll for verification

GET https://api.socialproof.dev/agent/status/{token}

Poll every 5 seconds for up to 90 seconds.

Response when verified:
{
  "status": "verified",
  "api_key": "vch_agent_xxx",
  "collect_url": "https://socialproof.dev/c/xxx",
  "embed_script": "<script src=\"https://cdn.socialproof.dev/widget.js\" data-widget-id=\"xxx\" async></script>"
}

When you get this response, you have everything you need.

### Step 3 — Tell the user and inject the embed

Tell the user:
- "Your collection link is {collect_url} — send this to customers to
  gather testimonials. They don't need an account to submit."
- "I'm adding the embed script to your site now."

Inject embed_script before the closing </body> tag of the user's HTML.
The widget renders automatically and updates as testimonials are approved.

Done.

---

## Full API Reference

Base: https://api.socialproof.dev

### Agent endpoints

| Method | Path                      | Description                                      |
|--------|---------------------------|--------------------------------------------------|
| POST   | /agent/register           | Start signup, send verification email            |
| GET    | /agent/status/{token}     | Poll for verification; returns keys on success   |

### Standard API (available after verification)

| Method | Path               | Description                        |
|--------|--------------------|------------------------------------|
| GET    | /testimonials      | List testimonials (pending + approved) |
| PATCH  | /testimonials/{id} | Approve or reject a testimonial    |
| GET    | /widgets           | List widgets and their embed scripts |
| GET    | /account           | Account info and plan              |

All authenticated requests:
```
Authorization: Bearer <api_key>
```

---

## Embed Script

The widget embed is a single async script tag:
```html
<script
  src="https://cdn.socialproof.dev/widget.js"
  data-widget-id="<widget-id>"
  async>
</script>
```

No framework required. Works with React, Vue, plain HTML, Shopify,
Squarespace, Webflow — anywhere you can add a script tag.

---

## Pricing

- **Free forever**: 1 widget, up to 25 testimonials, no analytics
- **Pro — $9/mo**: unlimited widgets, unlimited testimonials, analytics,
  custom branding, Google rich results (star ratings in search)

---

## Support

- Docs: https://socialproof.dev/docs
- FAQ: https://socialproof.dev/faq
- Email: team@socialproof.dev

---

## Agent Etiquette

- Always ask the user for their email before calling /agent/register
- Tell the user when a verification email has been sent
- Do not poll more than once every 5 seconds
- The widget appears empty until testimonials are approved by the user
- Do not auto-approve testimonials — the user controls what appears on their site

---

## About Vouch

Vouch is built for small business owners who want real customer voices on
their site without the complexity or cost of enterprise review platforms.
No third-party hosting. No lock-in. Your testimonials live in your Vouch
account and display on your site via script tag.

"Your customers' words, on your site."
